clips.title: The City
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX, impossible world rotation. A person stands perfectly still and centered while the entire city around them rotates impossibly — buildings, streets and sky wheeling around the fixed figure like a spinning diorama. A person in a jacket standing still. Fixed subject, rotating world, impossible physics, 24fps.
